scripts.mobile: echo "**Need dev build app installed already**" && cd App && npx expo start --dev-client -c --port 8082
scripts.android:prev: cd App && eas build --platform android --profile preview
scripts.android:prod: cd App && eas build --platform android --profile production
scripts.android:dev: cd App && eas build --platform android --profile development
scripts.ios:prev: cd App && eas build --platform ios --profile preview
scripts.ios:prod: cd App && eas build --platform ios --profile production
scripts.ios:dev: cd App && eas build --platform ios --profile development
